limitations: No quantified AI-specific capex or budget figures appear in the excerpts; investment intensity scored 3 based on named infrastructure and AI initiatives without dollar amounts or headcount figures.

Narrative concreteness scored 4 based on named deployed use cases (AI personalization, AI customer support, fraud detection) with operational detail but no quantified business results (e.g., % improvement, cost savings) disclosed in these excerpts.

Risk disclosure scored 4 rather than 5 because, while specific risk mechanisms are described (model errors, regulatory penalties, vendor dependence, competitive disadvantage), no quantified risk exposure figures or named internal AI governance/oversight bodies are disclosed in the excerpts.
